description: Rogue Frontier Patch 8 (26 May 2025) — Small patch with combat balance and minor bug fixes.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Combat balance changes for this patch are published separately (thread 212349).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Spontaneous Combustion (Flamewalker Staff): Fixed issue where the transformation could be treated as a valid target by other spells or effects
Fixed issue where clicking a character's name in the player context menu opened via chat could cause unintended movement
Fixed issue where Raid Banners could continue to reduce Fortification damage protection even after being dropped
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Spontaneous Combustion Flamewalker Staff transformation target spells effects player context menu chat unintended movement Raid Banners Fortification damage protection dropped
